name: Viskase Holdings, Inc.
business: Enzon Pharmaceuticals, Inc. is positioned as a public company acquisition vehicle. It has no clinical operations and limited corporate operations, with no employees. Its only significant activity is the pending merger with Viskase Companies, Inc., after which it will become Viskase Holdings, Inc.

catalysts.sentence: The Series C Exchange Offer will expire one minute after 11:59 p.m., Eastern Time, on March 9, 2026, unless extended or terminated in Enzon's sole discretion or in accordance with applicable law.
In addition, either Enzon or Viskase may terminate the Merger Agreement if the Merger is not consummated prior to 11:59 p.m., eastern time, on March 31, 2026.
